aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Restless ambition

💼 Career: Tum jaldi result chahoge, par impatience mistake karwa sakta hai

❤️ Love: Har baat control karne ki habit tension create karegi

💰 Money: Aggressive decision avoid karo

🧘 Advice: Slow down before reacting

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum speed me clarity lose kar dete ho
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Grounded calm

💼 Career: Tumhara practical approach ek stable success laayega

❤️ Love: Comfort aur trust deepen honge

💰 Money: Financial planning strong rahegi

🧘 Advice: Consistency maintain rakho

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tumhara patience hi tumhari hidden power hai
gemini:
♊ Gemini

💼 Career: Too many ideas execution ko weak karenge

🧘 Advice: Focus simplify karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum excitement me direction bhool jaate ho
